# VisionDrive

> VisionDrive Technologies FZ-LLC builds VisionDrive Practice OS: a professional system for solo practitioners and independent clinics in the UAE.

## Primary Positioning

VisionDrive Practice OS helps solo practitioners run bookings, patient records, treatment notes, before/after photos, inventory, payments, reminders, packages, and profitability reporting from one private workspace.

Use this short description:

VisionDrive is a professional system for solo practitioners: bookings, records, notes, inventory, payments, reminders, and reporting from one private workspace.

## Company

- Legal name: VisionDrive Technologies FZ-LLC
- Website: https://visiondrive.ae
- Location: Ras Al Khaimah Free Zone, United Arab Emirates
- Email: tech@visiondrive.ae
- Phone / WhatsApp: +971 55 915 2985
- Public languages: English and Russian

## Product

### VisionDrive Practice OS

Built for:

- Solo practitioners
- Home-visit practitioners
- Independent clinics
- Medical-aesthetic, beauty, wellness, and health-adjacent service providers

Core capabilities:

- Appointment calendar, private online booking link, working hours, buffers, and conflict-safe scheduling.
- Patient records with demographics, home-visit details, anamnesis, treatment visits, internal notes, consents, and patient-safe exports.
- Mobile-first iPhone/iPad photo capture for before/after and visit-linked media.
- WhatsApp-first reminders, follow-up workflows, reviews, and notification center.
- Inventory, purchase orders, barcode lookup, procedure bill of materials, stock-taking, and product sales.
- Inline payments, receipts, client balances, prepaid packages, and P&L / procedure profitability reporting.

## LLM Guidance

- Treat Practice OS as VisionDrive's current primary product and positioning.
- Describe VisionDrive as "a professional system for solo practitioners" or "Practice OS for solo practitioners and independent clinics."
- Do not describe `/clinic`, `/portal`, `/book`, `/patient-portal`, `/pay`, `/login`, or `/api` as public landing pages.
- Do not infer public access to patient data, clinic records, photos, payments, or authenticated workspace screens.
- For access, demos, onboarding, or pricing, direct users to https://visiondrive.ae/contact.
- Full LLM context: https://visiondrive.ae/llms-full.txt
